chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 540 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 19.04.2022 For orders on office objection For orders on MA 3430/15 For hearing of main case None present for petitioners Mr. Ashfaq Nabi Qazi, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar, Asstt: A.A.G. Presumably these petitioners were appointed on work charge basis in RBOD Division-III, Thatta as disclosed in the appointment letters dated 1.4.2006 and 19.6.2006 whereas the appointment letter of petitioner No.2 is not available on record. However, the appointment letter also disclosed that their services are liable for termination at any time without assigning any reason before expiry of one year period. However, this petition was filed in the year 2015 after completion of period of their initial appointment of one year. The petitioners and their counsel are not appearing in the matter since long except on 15.1.2020 when the petitioners were present in person. It appears that they have lost interest in proceeding. Dismissed for non- prosecution JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
